{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Talent Acquisition Specialist",
  "description": "Multipro Consumer Products Limited is the largest company in Nigeria dealing in Sales, Haulage and Logistics. MCPL was founded in 1996 as a fully owned company of the Tolaram Group. The first product sold by MCPL in 1996 was Indomie and since then it has played a seminal role in making Indomie a household brand in Nigeria. MCPL over the years has grown adding 13 brands in various categories comprising of Noodle, Snacks, Milk, Cereal, Oil, Homecare and Personal Hygiene.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Talent Acquisition Specialist

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A reputable multinational FMCG company is currently looking for an experienced recruiter to handle recruitment operations across the country.


Key Responsibilities


	Fully execute the end-to-end recruitment process including job posting, phone interviewing, job interviewing, regular communication with candidates and recruitment leadership.
	Actively search resumes on various recruitment channels to get sufficient and qualified CVs for recruitment requirements.
	Screen CVs and shortlist candidates for further processing.
	Build applicant sources and data by researching and contacting community services, colleges, employment agencies, other recruiters, media and internet sites.
	Manage the posting of job vacancies at top performing recruitment channels.


Qualifications


	At least 2-3 year of proven experience in recruitment as an in-house recruiter, head hunter or within a recruitment agency, preferably in FMCG industry.
	An active, hardworking, enthusiastic nature and a willingness to work overtime.
	Natural networking ability and a love of meeting new people.
	Excellent written and oral English communication skills.


Benefits


	Attractive Remuneration | Pension | HMO | Monthly Product Pack | 13th Month Pay |Incentives | Leave Allowance.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-20",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-16",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "name": "MULTIPRO CONSUMER PRODUCTS LIMITED"

Talent Acquisition Specialist Job at Multipro Consumer Products Limited




        
    

        
        Multipro Consumer Products Limited is the largest company in Nigeria dealing in Sales, Haulage and Logistics. MCPL was founded in 1996 as a fully owned company of the Tolaram Group. The first product sold by MCPL in 1996 was Indomie and since then it has played a seminal role in making Indomie a household brand in Nigeria. MCPL over the years has grown adding 13 brands in various categories comprising of Noodle, Snacks, Milk, Cereal, Oil, Homecare and Personal Hygiene.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Talent Acquisition Specialist

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	A reputable multinational FMCG company is currently looking for an experienced recruiter to handle recruitment operations across the country.


Key Responsibilities


	Fully execute the end-to-end recruitment process including job posting, phone interviewing, job interviewing, regular communication with candidates and recruitment leadership.
	Actively search resumes on various recruitment channels to get sufficient and qualified CVs for recruitment requirements.
	Screen CVs and shortlist candidates for further processing.
	Build applicant sources and data by researching and contacting community services, colleges, employment agencies, other recruiters, media and internet sites.
	Manage the posting of job vacancies at top performing recruitment channels.


Qualifications


	At least 2-3 year of proven experience in recruitment as an in-house recruiter, head hunter or within a recruitment agency, preferably in FMCG industry.
	An active, hardworking, enthusiastic nature and a willingness to work overtime.
	Natural networking ability and a love of meeting new people.
	Excellent written and oral English communication skills.


Benefits


	Attractive Remuneration | Pension | HMO | Monthly Product Pack | 13th Month Pay |Incentives | Leave Allowance.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Executive",
  "description": "Vitra (C-ceramica Operations Limited) - Since 2010, C-Ceramica has been a leading provider of innovative building materials and interior solutions in Nigeria. Specializing in advanced bathroom and interior designs, we offer a wide range of premium products, including sanitary ware, tiles, doors, and more. Our expertise lies in combining global trends with local needs to deliver exceptional residential and commercial projects. With a focus on quality, sustainability, and personalized service, we help you create spaces that reflect your style and vision. At C-Ceramica, we&rsquo;re committed to transforming your spaces into functional, stylish, and eco-friendly environments. Let us bring your dream home to life.

Our expertise lies in combining global trends with local needs to deliver exceptional residential and commercial projects. With a focus on quality, sustainability, and personalized service, we help you create spaces that reflect your style and vision. We are committed to transforming your spaces into functional, stylish, and eco-friendly environments.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive

Job Location: Wuse 2, Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
Educational Qualification &amp; Experience:


	Qualification: Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Finance, or a related discipline must also have proven track record in sales, and a robust blend of strategic thinking and negotiation.
	Experience: Minimum of 2&ndash;3 years of hands-on experience in sales, marketing, or business development&mdash;ideally in a B2B (Business-to-Business) environment.
	Track Record: Documented success in meeting or exceeding quotas and generating qualified leads.
	Top candidates should be residents of the FCT and its environs.


Core Technical Competencies:


	Market Research &amp; Analysis: Ability to analyze market trends, identify competitor weaknesses, and map out high-potential target segments.
	Pipeline Management: Proficiency in maintaining a sales funnel and using CRM tools to track opportunities.
	Commercial Acumen: The ability to draft persuasive proposals, negotiate favorable contract terms, and close high-value deals.
	Product Literacy: Capacity to quickly learn complex products/services and effectively translate technical details into client benefits. [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]


Essential Soft Skills:


	Communication &amp; Presentation: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills; must be highly articulate when pitching ideas to senior stakeholders.
	Interpersonal &amp; Networking: Naturally charismatic with the ability to build, nurture, and leverage professional relationships.
	Problem-Solving: Resourceful and adaptable; able to overcome objections and creatively simplify complex client challenges.
	Self-Motivation &amp; Resilience: High energy, initiative, and the psychological stamina to handle rejection and work independently.


Salary
N100,000 / Month.

Method of Applictaion&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cover Letter statting how they can add value to the company and improve sales and also a copy of thier Curriculum Vitae all in PDF attached, to: abuja.frontdesk@c-ceramica.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only qualified candidates should apply.",

Business Development Executive Job at VITRA (C-ceramica Operations Limited)




        
    

        
        Vitra (C-ceramica Operations Limited) - Since 2010, C-Ceramica has been a leading provider of innovative building materials and interior solutions in Nigeria. Specializing in advanced bathroom and interior designs, we offer a wide range of premium products, including sanitary ware, tiles, doors, and more. Our expertise lies in combining global trends with local needs to deliver exceptional residential and commercial projects. With a focus on quality, sustainability, and personalized service, we help you create spaces that reflect your style and vision. At C-Ceramica, we’re committed to transforming your spaces into functional, stylish, and eco-friendly environments. Let us bring your dream home to life.
     

            
    



Our expertise lies in combining global trends with local needs to deliver exceptional residential and commercial projects. With a focus on quality, sustainability, and personalized service, we help you create spaces that reflect your style and vision. We are committed to transforming your spaces into functional, stylish, and eco-friendly environments.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive

Job Location: Wuse 2, Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
Educational Qualification & Experience:


	Qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Finance, or a related discipline must also have proven track record in sales, and a robust blend of strategic thinking and negotiation.
	Experience: Minimum of 2–3 years of hands-on experience in sales, marketing, or business development—ideally in a B2B (Business-to-Business) environment.
	Track Record: Documented success in meeting or exceeding quotas and generating qualified leads.
	Top candidates should be residents of the FCT and its environs.


Core Technical Competencies:


	Market Research & Analysis: Ability to analyze market trends, identify competitor weaknesses, and map out high-potential target segments.
	Pipeline Management: Proficiency in maintaining a sales funnel and using CRM tools to track opportunities.
	Commercial Acumen: The ability to draft persuasive proposals, negotiate favorable contract terms, and close high-value deals.
	Product Literacy: Capacity to quickly learn complex products/services and effectively translate technical details into client benefits. [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]


Essential Soft Skills:


	Communication & Presentation: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills; must be highly articulate when pitching ideas to senior stakeholders.
	Interpersonal & Networking: Naturally charismatic with the ability to build, nurture, and leverage professional relationships.
	Problem-Solving: Resourceful and adaptable; able to overcome objections and creatively simplify complex client challenges.
	Self-Motivation & Resilience: High energy, initiative, and the psychological stamina to handle rejection and work independently.


Salary
N100,000 / Month.

Method of Applictaion 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cover Letter statting how they can add value to the company and improve sales and also a copy of thier Curriculum Vitae all in PDF attached, to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only qualified candidates should apply.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job type: Full time

Job Description


	The Account Reconciliation Officer is responsible for ensuring that the company&rsquo;s financial records are accurate by regularly comparing and reconciling the internal records with external sources such as bank statements, vendor accounts, and customer balances.


Duties &amp; Responsibilities


	Reconcile bank statements with internal financial records regularly.
	Investigate and resolve discrepancies in financial records.
	Prepare monthly reconciliation reports and present them to management.
	Monitor and verify the accuracy of accounts payable and receivable records.
	Assist in month-end and year-end financial closing processes.
	Collaborate with other departments to ensure accurate financial reporting.


Educational Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Banking &amp; Finance or any finance related field
	1 - 2 years of relevant of proven experience
	Professional certification (e.g., CPA, ACCA) is a plus.
	Proficiency in accounting software (Tally) and Microsoft Office Suite.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Account Reconciliation Officer Job at Me cure Healthcare Limited




        
    

        
        Me Cure Services - Diagnostic & Healthcare Center Nigeria Me Cure Healthcare Limited (MHL) is a Leader in the Medical Diagnostic and Healthcare sector in Nigeria and the West African sub-region with an established Pharmaceutical Manufacturing Company in Lagos, and Diagnostic Centers in Lagos, Victoria Islands and Kano.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Reconciliation Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full time

Job Description
     

            
    




	The Account Reconciliation Officer is responsible for ensuring that the company’s financial records are accurate by regularly comparing and reconciling the internal records with external sources such as bank statements, vendor accounts, and customer balances.


Duties & Responsibilities


	Reconcile bank statements with internal financial records regularly.
	Investigate and resolve discrepancies in financial records.
	Prepare monthly reconciliation reports and present them to management.
	Monitor and verify the accuracy of accounts payable and receivable records.
	Assist in month-end and year-end financial closing processes.
	Collaborate with other departments to ensure accurate financial reporting.


Educational Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Banking & Finance or any finance related field
	1 - 2 years of relevant of proven experience
	Professional certification (e.g., CPA, ACCA) is a plus.
	Proficiency in accounting software (Tally) and Microsoft Office Suite.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Fiber Optics Engineer",
  "description": "Cobranet Limited; a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe.

Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fiber Optics Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Duties and Responsibilities


	Responsible for customer premise installations, including racking, cabling, bonding and grounding.
	Coordinate fiber activities with other departments and the Manager of OSP construction
	Perform ring cuts on live fiber without affecting existing services.
	Perform fiber tests with OTDR&rsquo;s, light source and meters.
	Terminate, splice, bonds/grounds and tests fiber optic equipment to division standards.
	Provide accurate equipment location, splicing and terminating records for the fiber database.
	Assist Construction/Engineering departments in accepting and turning up the fiber network.
	Perform installation of fiber optic equipment and patch and panels.
	Monitor, communicate and perform corrective actions to fix problems affecting any fiber or fiber related equipment.
	Install demarcation enclosures and other telecom equipment.
	Must be well versed in modern fiber splicing techniques.
	OTDR, power meters, traffic identifiers, digital multimeters, cleavers, strippers, buffer tube splitters, cable ring tools, hand tools, toners, duct rodders, ladders, bucket trucks
	Ability to work under minimal supervision. And apply technical expertise to evaluate problems and implementing the best solutions.
	Work a variety of schedules including normal duty and on call duty.
	Will be required to work night shifts and overtime when needed


Education and qualifications


	B.Sc / HND in Electrical Electronic/Computer engineering or other related Course.
	3+ years of technical experience in a telecommunications or network operations environment.
	Independent problem solver combined with strong team orientation.
	Knowledgeable in cisco switching and routing configuration and troubleshooting
	Good understanding of telecommunication equipment operation
	Good experience of multi-vendor telecommunication equipment
	Age: More than 25 years old
	Years of Experience: 4+ Year.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: recruitment@cobranet.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only qualified candidates should apply.",

Fiber Optics Engineer Job at Cobranet Limited




        
    

        
        Cobranet Limited; a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe.

Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fiber Optics Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

            
    



Duties and Responsibilities


	Responsible for customer premise installations, including racking, cabling, bonding and grounding.
	Coordinate fiber activities with other departments and the Manager of OSP construction
	Perform ring cuts on live fiber without affecting existing services.
	Perform fiber tests with OTDR’s, light source and meters.
	Terminate, splice, bonds/grounds and tests fiber optic equipment to division standards.
	Provide accurate equipment location, splicing and terminating records for the fiber database.
	Assist Construction/Engineering departments in accepting and turning up the fiber network.
	Perform installation of fiber optic equipment and patch and panels.
	Monitor, communicate and perform corrective actions to fix problems affecting any fiber or fiber related equipment.
	Install demarcation enclosures and other telecom equipment.
	Must be well versed in modern fiber splicing techniques.
	OTDR, power meters, traffic identifiers, digital multimeters, cleavers, strippers, buffer tube splitters, cable ring tools, hand tools, toners, duct rodders, ladders, bucket trucks
	Ability to work under minimal supervision. And apply technical expertise to evaluate problems and implementing the best solutions.
	Work a variety of schedules including normal duty and on call duty.
	Will be required to work night shifts and overtime when needed


Education and qualifications


	B.Sc / HND in Electrical Electronic/Computer engineering or other related Course.
	3+ years of technical experience in a telecommunications or network operations environment.
	Independent problem solver combined with strong team orientation.
	Knowledgeable in cisco switching and routing configuration and troubleshooting
	Good understanding of telecommunication equipment operation
	Good experience of multi-vendor telecommunication equipment
	Age: More than 25 years old
	Years of Experience: 4+ Year.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only qualified candidates should apply.    

    

        Click here to Apply
